name: Sauce for Grilled Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the egg yolks and anchovy fillets separately.
2. Combine the chopped egg yolks and anchovy fillets in a mortar and pestle.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Gradually stir in the olive oil until the sauce has a creamy consistency.
5. Stir in the lemon juice.
6. Serve over grilled or boiled fish.
